summary: DHH announces that the Building of Basecamp workshop is coming to Copenhagen, marking its first event outside the United States. The workshop is scheduled for June 9th, strategically paired with the Reboot conference starting June 10th. He promotes a new workshop website created for the European expansion and notes strong demand, with the previous workshop selling out in one week. The post is essentially a promotional announcement encouraging quick registration.
key_points: The Building of Basecamp workshop expands internationally for the first time, heading to Copenhagen
The event is strategically scheduled alongside the Reboot conference to attract a critical mass of attendees
Previous workshops sold out within a week, suggesting strong market demand for 37signals' methodology
A new dedicated workshop website was launched to support the European expansion
money_quotes: The first Building of Basecamp to leave the States is heading for its second home of Copenhagen.
The last workshop sold out in just one week. I wouldn't be putting off my registration, if I were you.
key_insight: 37signals was expanding its brand and methodology internationally through workshops, leveraging conference co-location and scarcity marketing to build demand.
